Debt.title: Debt Record
Debt.description: Represents a debt entry in the store ledger containing the customer name and amount owed.

id.description: Unique identifier of the debt record

customerName.description: Name of the person who owes the debt

amount.description: The amount of money owed in Naira (₦)

notes.description: Optional notes or details about the debt

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the debt record was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the debt record was last updated

Product.title: Store Product
Product.description: Represents a physical store product synced in Firestore.

cost_price.description: Wholesale cost price of the item

selling_price.description: Retail selling price of the item

imageUrl.description: URL to the product thumbnail image

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was updated

Invoice.title: Digital Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents a digitized sales invoice containing detailed transaction items, totals, and payment status.

items.description: The list of items sold in this transaction

totalCost.description: Total cost price of items in Naira

totalSelling.description: Total selling price of items in Naira

totalProfit.description: Net profit made from this invoice

amountPaid.description: The amount the customer paid at checkout

notes.description: Optional notes or comments on this invoice

shopName.description: Optional custom shop name printed on the invoice

shopPhone.description: Optional custom telephone number printed on the invoice

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice was generated

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice was last modified

/stores/{storeId}/debts/{debtId}.description: Debts collection sub-resource within a specific store account

/stores/{storeId}/invoices/{invoiceId}.description: Historical sales invoices collection sub-resource for a store account

/stores/{storeId}/products/{productId}.description: Custom products list for a specific store account
